candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label at the top of the income statement; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate revenue total with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes across years.

candidates.row_label: Sales gains related to property transac
candidates.why: Refers to gains on sales, not core revenue.

candidates.row_label: Sales gain-cancel. of a cost provision
candidates.why: Non-operating/special gain, not revenue.
Disposal gain, not operating revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement revenue.

variables.notes: Use as priority list; do not sum. 'Sales' is the cleanest top-line label, with 'Total Revenue' as fallback.

candidates.why: Best direct operating cost / cost of sales style row; broad production input cost subtotal.
Component of materials and services, not full COGS when broader subtotal exists.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Semantically exact but appears unpopulated in preview; less reliable than populated 'Materials and services'.
Inventory asset, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected broader direct-cost row instead of narrower component 'Purchases during the financial year'.

candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel expense above operating result.
Likely component of 'Employee costs'; excluded to avoid double counting since broader row exists.
SG&A-type component, but appears to be included within employee costs; excluded to avoid double counting.
Core overhead bucket above operating result.
Dedicated R&D row above operating result; include in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD nets out R&D if separately reported.
R&D-related label exists but appears in supplemental section below operating result; less preferred for XSGA under placement rule.
Non-recurring item, not core SG&A component.
Balance sheet liability/accrual, not income statement SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row exists. Selected overhead buckets above operating result. Included 'R&D Costs' as separate above-EBIT R&D line so that PROF's (XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD) can remove it.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label located above operating result; preferred by placement rule.
Dedicated R&D label but appears in supplemental section below operating result; fallback only.

variables.notes: Priority list; prefer above-EBIT 'R&D Costs'. Included fallback 'R&D Expense' in case reporting label changes across years.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense line that includes interest; useful fallback if pure interest expense unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities carried at amortised cost using the effective interest method
candidates.why: Most specific and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest and other financial expenses - the rest
candidates.why: Residual component only, not full interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Specific subset of interest expense, not full company interest expense.
Balancing row should not be used when substantive line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on financial liabilities carried at amortised cost using the effective interest method

variables.notes: Priority list; later code should take first non-missing value. Excluded balancing and residual/subset rows.

candidates.why: Income statement earnings item, not book equity.
Income statement item, not equity on balance sheet.
Not shareholders' equity.
Component of equity only, not total owner equity.
Semantically suitable owner equity label, but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of parent company
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line, excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity including non-controlling interests, so less preferred because MIB is separately mapped.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of parent company

variables.notes: Priority list of owner-equity labels that exclude non-controlling interests. Did not use 'Total shareholders equity' to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet minority equity.
Best balance sheet minority equity label.
Duplicate capitalization variant; useful fallback if label changes.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement OCI attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance sheet non-controlling interest labels.
